introSection: Zolo Coaster is a steel roller coaster built by Italian manufacturer Pinfari currently standing but not operating at Jungle Land in Jeddah, Makkah, Saudi Arabia.

sections.title: History
sections.content: Barry's Amusements announced the addition of a new coaster in January 1997.

fullText:
Zolo Coaster is a steel roller coaster built by Italian manufacturer Pinfari currently standing but not operating at Jungle Land in Jeddah, Makkah, Saudi Arabia.

Barry's Amusements announced the addition of a new coaster in January 1997.
